Plaintiff O'Reilly'S Bar And Restaurant'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff O'Reilly's Bar And Restaurant's Motion For Preliminary Injunction.
APPEARANCES: Burke Hansen, Esq. of The Law Offices of Burke Hansen 771-6174 for pltfs & moving parties; Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 for deft & opposing party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - THE MOTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THAT PLAINTIFF MAY PREVAIL. Court denied plaintiff's request for continuance. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
